creator: tmclaugh@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
In addition, can --enable-configurable-krb5-ccname-env be added to the
CONFIGURE_ARGS?  To make krb5_ccname work in the nss_ldap.conf, nss_ldap
must be built with either --enable-configurable-krb5-ccname-env or
--enable-configurable-krb5-ccname-gssapi.  The env method requires no
kerberos dependency while the GSSAPI method does and only works with
MIT's krb5.  Thanks.

tom
